_module: Module 2 Delta — new requirements + constant promotions

new_requirements.statement: The system shall detect silent correctness failures (uncited claims, stale citations, false-positive gate passes) within MTTD ≤ 120 seconds.
new_requirements.measurable_via: Audit-event → alert latency in production observability.

new_requirements.statement: The system shall detect telemetry-pipeline failures (dropped metrics, backpressure breach) within MTTD ≤ 300 seconds.
The Probe SDK shall enforce read-only capability at the syscall/driver layer regardless of credential scope, such that any write attempt fails closed.
new_requirements.measurable_via: Release-build SBOM diff; grep of bundled output for write primitives.

new_requirements.statement: Credentials issued to the Probe SDK shall be rotated at least every CREDENTIAL_ROTATION_DAYS without service interruption to live sessions (grace window).
new_requirements.measurable_via: Doppler rotation audit log + zero-downtime test.

new_requirements.statement: The LLM Provider Layer shall maintain at least SS4_PROVIDER_FALLBACK_DEPTH distinct providers such that the service remains available when up to (depth - 1) providers simultaneously fail.
new_requirements.measurable_via: Chaos test: force 2 provider outages; user-visible error rate ≤ 0.1%.

new_requirements.statement: Audit log writes shall follow a split policy: compliance-critical events (auth, CLI emit, spec emit, credential rotation) are synchronous-durable; telemetry events (probe metrics, cache hits, UI events) are asynchronous best-effort.
new_requirements.measurable_via: Write path audit; compliance-event success rate = 100%, telemetry-event success rate ≥ 99%.

new_requirements.statement: The Metrics Collector shall checkpoint its in-flight aggregation state to durable storage at least every METRIC_CHECKPOINT_INTERVAL_MIN such that on crash-restart no more than that interval of metrics is lost.
new_requirements.measurable_via: Chaos test: kill collector mid-window; lost-data window ≤ METRIC_CHECKPOINT_INTERVAL_MIN.

new_requirements.statement: The Collector shall apply a tiered flush-fallback batch threshold: FLUSH_FALLBACK_BATCH_MIN is reduced for low-traffic tenants so batches do not starve beyond the aggregation window.
The Traceback Store shall apply a tiered TTL: the top-50 most-cited sources expire every TRACEBACK_CACHE_TTL_HOURS_HOT; all other entries use TRACEBACK_CACHE_TTL_HOURS_DEFAULT.
new_requirements.measurable_via: Per-source TTL audit; top-50 refresh frequency matches hot TTL.

new_requirements.statement: The citation-check gate shall fail closed on timeout, rejecting the spec emission rather than passing through with an 'unknown' result.
new_requirements.measurable_via: Unit test: gate receives timeout → spec rejection event emitted.

new_requirements.statement: Session dispatch to the Agent Orchestrator shall use two-phase commit: IF-03 dispatch blocks on IF-09 mode-lock acknowledgement with a 2-second timeout; on timeout, dispatch is rejected and retried.
new_requirements.measurable_via: Race test: mode mutation mid-dispatch produces retry, not corrupted state.

new_requirements.statement: The Probe SDK shall self-govern: it measures local overhead and auto-throttles probe frequency if overhead > MAX_CUSTOMER_SYSTEM_OVERHEAD_PCT × 0.75, and activates a kill-switch at MAX_CUSTOMER_SYSTEM_OVERHEAD_PCT regardless of IF-18 backpressure state.
new_requirements.measurable_via: Overhead benchmark with synthetic load; SDK throttles and kill-switch fires at correct thresholds.

promoted_constants.source: M4 v2 EC17b split + existing ENCRYPTED_CREDENTIAL_EXPIRY_DAYS reconciliation

reconciliation_with_existing_m2_constant.action: Rename existing constant to CREDENTIAL_ROTATION_DAYS for consistency with M4 v2 EC17b naming; keep value unchanged.
Rename existing constant to CITATION_CHECK_LATENCY_MAX_S to align with M7 vocabulary; add 'hard-reject on exceed' semantics via R.109.

owner_requirement_backfill._note: The 28 existing M2 constants currently have no owner_requirement field (all '-'). The M2 delta fills these for the 14 new/renamed constants; the remaining 28 should be backfilled as a bookkeeping task — 3-4 hrs of work, non-blocking.

summary.blocking_for_v1: Yes — 5 constants (SS4_PROVIDER_FALLBACK_DEPTH, METRIC_CHECKPOINT_INTERVAL_MIN, CITATION_CHECK_LATENCY_MAX_S, AUDIT_WRITE_POLICY, MTTD_CORRECTNESS_MAX_S) are load-bearing for v1 test acceptance per the agent_swarm_execution_plan acceptance criteria.
